---
title: "Arturo Rosas"
author: "Arturo Rosas"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    toc: false
fontsize: 10pt
geometry: margin=0.7in
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

**Email:** [arturorosas9@gmail.com](mailto:arturorosas9@gmail.com)  
**Phone:** [(909) 635-9143](tel:+19096359143)  
**LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/auro-ros-003a7286](https://linkedin.com/in/auro-ros-003a7286)

# Summary

Results-driven professional with experience in customer service, sales, and project coordination. Proven ability to assess client needs, deliver tailored solutions, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure successful outcomes. Strong communication and problem-solving skills with a track record of training team members and improving customer satisfaction. Seeking opportunities in customer service or project management.

# Education

## California State Polytechnic University, Pomona

**Bachelor of Science, International Business & Marketing**  
Expected 2027

## Mt. San Antonio College

**Associate Degrees, Business Administration & Social and Behavioral Sciences**  
2023

# Experience

## Best Buy, West Covina, CA

**Appliance Category Advisor**  
2019 - Present

- Delivered tailored solutions to customers by assessing needs and recommending high-value appliance products
- Collaborated with contractors and clients to ensure project plans aligned with expectations and timelines
- Provided in-depth product knowledge to improve customer confidence and drive sales performance
- Trained and mentored team members to improve overall team effectiveness
- Resolved complex customer concerns to enhance satisfaction and retention

# Skills & Activities

- Bilingual: Fluent in Spanish
- Microsoft Office Suite: Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Outlook
- Customer Relationship Management: CRM
- Sales Strategy & Product Knowledge
- Team Training & Development
- Project Coordination & Client Communication
